name: Santa Vs Zomby
description: Just before Christmas night, zombies invade Santa’s base and steal all the gifts! Guide Santa, launch him at the zombies, use physics to knock them down, clear every level and save Christmas! Full description A group of zombies attacks Santa’s base and steals the presents meant for children. The elves are in shock — now it’s up to you! Launch Santa Claus at the zombies, use physics to make them fall or crash, destroy all enemies and complete every level. Simple rules, fun physics, and a clear goal: recover the gifts and save Christmas! ‍
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
